notes: Sequential inline Skill evaluation; no live external provider action was attempted.
Baseline runs omitted because sub-agent delegation is disabled for this task.
All three single-run with-skill evaluations passed, so there is no within-evaluation variance to analyze.
No without-skill baseline was run because sub-agent delegation is disabled; the displayed delta is a missing-baseline artifact and must not be interpreted as measured skill uplift.
Timing and tool-call telemetry were unavailable in the inline harness and are represented as zero; the token field is an output-character fallback rather than provider token usage.

Coverage targets fail-closed edge cases in recipe licensing, constrained repair, independent validation, and delivery governance; it is not a substitute for live Docker, provider, SCM, or signing-key integration tests.
